{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: Description has PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE (cli/cmd/worker.go:121-158, cli/cmd/worker_test.go:81-96)/PROPOSED FIX/NON-SCOPE with cross-refs to sibling beads ddx-b17cad6d, ddx-4d92f2cf and governing artifact ddx-9c53e551. AC is numbered, names two specific Test* functions, and ends with the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test -run ...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` lines. Labels carry area/kind/priority plus a parent cross-ref. No /tmp or chat-only references. Two minor prose gaps (label parent:ddx-9c53e551 vs top-level parent field ddx-14de66ea; 'the new supervisor helper' isn't named) don't block an implementation attempt since the file:line evidence lets an agent locate the relevant code. The five execution_failed prior_attempts all show failure_class routing/unknown with 'session closed before Stop hook' — an execution-environment/session issue, not a bead-content blocker, so they don't demote readiness under the stale-blocker rule.","fingerprint":"c1ae873b14821a9a90377be9842c39a756ad335df09ac359fe4a82065076952a","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"c1ae873b14821a9a90377be9842c39a756ad335df09ac359fe4a82065076952a"}
